sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14740" key="a)rbo/n" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρβόν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διεστός, ἀραιόν, ἐλαφρόν,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρβύκη·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τοῦ ὑποδήματος,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
